_shorthelp: Select sets up a list of choices. jQuery Mobile

addItem(item,val).desc: Add new item with optional value.

getValue(n).desc: Gets the value (true/false) of item n

List(n).desc: Gets the name of item n

ListCount.desc: Number of items. Same as getItemCount()

ListIndex.desc: Selected item. Same as Selected Index.

selectedIndex().desc: The number of the selected item.

selectedItem().desc: The name of the selected item.

selectedValue().desc: The value of the selected item.

setIndex(n).desc: Set the selected item to n.

text.desc: The text of the selected item. Same as selectedItem.

title: Combo Box

_placeholder.desc: Item to use as a heading in the picker, or 0 for none.

_multiSelect.desc: Allow multiple selection. nativeMenu must be false.

_overlayTheme.desc: Overlay Theme: a-z. a is normal, b is black and others custom.

_theme.desc: Theme: a-z. a is normal, b is black and others custom.

_group.desc: Is this part of a group?

_countryPicker.desc: Select from a list of countries.
